text: A district may plan, acquire, construct, complete, develop, own, operate, and maintain rail facilities inside or outside the district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.201 — General Authority over Rail Facilities

A district may plan, acquire, construct, complete, develop, own, operate, and maintain rail facilities inside or outside the district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district may plan, acquire, construct, complete, develop, own, operate, and maintain rail facilities inside or outside the district.
